sqCAD Documentation¶

sqCAD (Superconducting Quantum Circuit Analysis & Design) is a Python toolkit for network-based modeling, fitting, and design workflows for superconducting quantum circuits.

Install

pip install sqcad

Install
Quickstart

Fit a resonance / extract an equivalent model.

Quickstart
API Reference

Autogenerated docs for public functions/classes.

API Reference
